name: avatar
description: A user profile image with a fallback (usually initials) rendered when the image is missing or fails to load. Built on Radix UI Avatar — AvatarFallback accepts a delayMs prop to avoid flashing during fast loads.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes on the root

ai.whenToUse: Use for user profile images: headers, comments, user lists. Always include AvatarFallback for accessibility and loading states.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for decorative icons (use an or icon component). Don't use for product/brand images (use with proper sizing).
commonMistakes: No AvatarFallback — shows nothing when image is missing or errors
Omitting delayMs on AvatarFallback causes flicker for fast-loading images
Using for non-circular images (override rounded-full if needed)
ai.accessibilityNotes: AvatarImage requires alt text. AvatarFallback renders initials or an icon — ensure the visible text is meaningful.
